sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72387" key="oi)kofulake/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκο-φῠλᾰκέω</orth>, <sense id="n72387.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">watch a house,</tr_> of a dog, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:176" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">176</biblScope> </bibl> Chambry.</sense> </entryFree>
